description:
## Component: hx-search (NEW)
**Tier 2 — Standard Enterprise | Industry Consensus: 3/6 libraries**

Search-optimized text input with clear button, search icon, and optional suggestions.

### ADR-001 Classification: Hybrid (Form Component)
Properties control search behavior. Slots for label/suggestions.

### API Design
**Properties:** `name`, `value`, `placeholder` (default "Search..."), `label`, `disabled`, `loading`, `hx-size`
**Slots:** Default (label), `suggestions` (search suggestions dropdown)
**CSS Parts:** `input`, `search-icon`, `clear-button`, `suggestions`
**Events:** `hx-search` (composed: true, detail: { query }), `hx-clear`, `hx-input`

### Drupal Integration
```twig
<hx-search name="q" placeholder="Search patients..." label="Patient Search">
</hx-search>
{# Drupal behavior listens to hx-search, performs AJAX search #}
```

### ElementInternals: Form participation
### Healthcare: Patient search, medication lookup, facility finder

### Acceptance Criteria
1. Built-in search icon prefix and clear button suffix
2. hx-search event fires on Enter or after debounce
3. Loading state while async search runs
4. Clear button resets and focuses input
5. Works with Drupal AJAX search
title: T2-31: hx-search — Search-Optimized Text Input

Search-optimized text input with clear button, search icon, and optional suggestions.

coderabbitai: **Actionable comments posted: 6**

> [!CAUTION]
> Some comments are outside the diff and can’t be posted inline due to platform limitations.
> 
> 
> 
> <details>
> <summary>⚠️ Outside diff range comments (1)</summary><blockquote>
> 
> <details>
> <summary>packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-search/hx-search.styles.ts (1)</summary><blockquote>
> 
> `22-223`: _⚠️ Potential issue_ | _🟠 Major_
> 
> **Replace raw fallback literals with token-only values.**
> 
> Lines in this range hardcode spacing/color/typography/timing fallbacks (for example `0.25rem`, `#343a40`, `150ms ease`). That breaks the token-only theming contract and makes downstream theming inconsistent.
> 
> <details>
> <summary>♻️ Token-only pattern (apply throughout this file)</summary>
> 
> ```diff
> - gap: var(--hx-space-1, 0.25rem);
> + gap: var(--hx-space-1);
> 
> - color: var(--hx-input-label-color, var(--hx-color-neutral-700, `#343a40`));
> + color: var(--hx-input-label-color, var(--hx-color-neutral-700));
> 
> - transition:
> -   border-color var(--hx-transition-fast, 150ms ease),
> -   box-shadow var(--hx-transition-fast, 150ms ease);
> + transition:
> +   border-color var(--hx-transition-fast),
> +   box-shadow var(--hx-transition-fast);
> ```
> </details>
> 
>    
> As per coding guidelines: `packages/hx-library/src/**/*.styles.ts`: No hardcoded values — Colors, spacing, typography, and timing must use design tokens (--hx-* CSS custom properties). Always.
> 
> <details>
> <summary>🤖 Prompt for AI Agents</summary>
> 
> ```

> var(--hx-input-label-color, var(--hx-color-neutral-700, `#343a40`)); transition:
> border-color var(--hx-transition-fast, 150ms ease)) which violates the
